tools.name: rdev.tickets.create
tools.description: Create a short-lived support or remote development ticket for a target host.
tools.safety: Creates access path; does not execute on host.

tools.name: rdev.tickets.revoke
tools.description: Revoke a support ticket and prevent new host enrollment through it.

tools.name: rdev.hosts.list
tools.description: List enrolled or pending hosts visible to the operator.

tools.name: rdev.hosts.capabilities
tools.description: Inspect detected and approved capabilities for one host.

tools.name: rdev.hosts.approve
tools.description: Approve a pending host for a ticket-scoped policy.

tools.name: rdev.hosts.revoke
tools.description: Revoke host access and disconnect active sessions.

tools.name: rdev.jobs.create
tools.description: Create a signed, policy-bound remote job for an approved host.
tools.safety: May execute on host after policy checks.

tools.name: rdev.jobs.status
tools.description: Read status and latest events for a remote job.

tools.name: rdev.jobs.cancel
tools.description: Request cooperative cancellation of a running job.

tools.name: rdev.jobs.approve
tools.description: Approve a pending high-risk job action such as elevation or package install.

tools.name: rdev.artifacts.list
tools.description: List artifacts produced by a job.

tools.name: rdev.artifacts.read
tools.description: Read an artifact produced by a job.
tools.safety: Read-only; may expose sensitive job output.

tools.name: rdev.artifacts.export_bundle
tools.description: Export a reviewable evidence bundle for one job, including manifest, checksums, envelope, artifacts, and audit slice.
tools.safety: Read-only evidence export; may expose sensitive job output.

tools.name: rdev.audit.query
tools.description: Query redacted audit events for tickets, hosts, and jobs.

tools.name: rdev.policy.explain
tools.description: Explain whether a requested action would be allowed by policy.

tools.name: rdev.policy.explain_shell
tools.description: Explain whether a shell job policy is structurally allowed before creating a signed job.
tools.safety: Read-only policy simulation; host still re-validates before execution.

tools.name: rdev.enrollment.verify_certificate
tools.description: Verify a host enrollment certificate against a pinned enrollment root before trusting a host registration.
tools.safety: Read-only certificate validation; does not issue certificates or grant host access.

tools.name: rdev.adapter.verify_result
tools.description: Verify an adapter result artifact against the public result-artifact conformance contract.
tools.safety: Read-only artifact validation; does not execute on a host.

tools.name: rdev.adapter.verify_lifecycle
tools.description: Verify an adapter lifecycle manifest against the public Adapter SDK lifecycle conformance contract.
tools.safety: Read-only manifest validation; does not execute on a host.

tools.name: rdev.adapter.verify_cancellation
tools.description: Verify an adapter cancellation result artifact against the public cancellation conformance contract.
tools.safety: Read-only artifact validation; does not execute on a host.

tools.name: rdev.adapter.verify_runtime
tools.description: Verify an adapter runtime fixture generated by the public Adapter SDK lifecycle runner.
tools.safety: Read-only fixture validation; does not execute on a host.
